free_text: Total Neutron Cross Sections of 249Bk and 249Cf below
Update to new date formats, lower case.
Data values replaced with published values.
Corrected for background and resolution and doppler
Data errors given are statistical errors.
Lower energy 0.70 eV misquoted in article as 0.070 eV.
Corrections made for missed resonances up to 62 eV
Sample thickness for all mass 249 nuclei: 6.485E-04
